rulings.Case Title: FLORA NG VS. STERLING REAL ESTATE PARNERS II, LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Sterling Real Estate Parners Ii, Llc, Sterling Pacific Lending, Inc., Dba Sterling And Yosemite Management Group, Llc'S Notice And Motion To Strike Portions Of Verified Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 3, 2012, line 1. Defendants Sterling Real Estate Parners Ii, Llc, Sterling Pacific Lending, Inc. And Yosemite Management Group, Llc'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Verified Fourth Amended Complaint. Continued to May 21, 2012. Moving party to file and serve substantive reply by may 16, 2012 - nota bene, opposition was late. = (501/REQ)
